recommendations.title: Down and Out in Beverly Hills
recommendations.overview: Beverly Hills couple Barbara and Dave Whiteman find their lives altered by the arrival of a vagrant who tries to drown himself in their swimming pool.

recommendations.title: Bob & Carol & Ted & Alice
recommendations.overview: After returning to Los Angeles from a group therapy session, documentary filmmaker Bob Sanders and his wife, Carol, find themselves becoming vigilante couples counselors, offering unsolicited advice to their best friends, Ted and Alice Henderson. Not

recommendations.title: Looks That Kill
recommendations.overview: A teenager lives out the hilarious and often tragic consequences of being lethally attractive, until he meets a girl with a congenital defect.

recommendations.title: The Greatest Showman
recommendations.overview: The story of American showman P.T. Barnum, founder of the circus that became the famous traveling Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus.

recommendations.title: The Circus
recommendations.overview: Charlie, a wandering tramp, becomes a circus handyman - soon the star of the show - and falls in love with the circus owner's stepdaughter.

recommendations.title: Möbius
recommendations.overview: An FSB officer falls in love with his agent, an American woman who works as a trader in a Russian bank.

recommendations.title: Manhattan
recommendations.overview: Manhattan explores how the life of a middle-aged television writer dating a teenage girl is further complicated when he falls in love with his best friend's mistress.

recommendations.title: A Patch of Blue
recommendations.overview: A blind, uneducated white girl is befriended by a black man, who becomes determined to help her escape her impoverished and abusive home life.

recommendations.title: The Clown
recommendations.overview: The life of the owners of Circus Esperança, Puro Sangue e Pangaré, father and son, who plays two clowns. At a certain point, Pangaré starts showing tiredness and sadness for being an unhappy clown.

recommendations.title: My Oxford Year
recommendations.overview: An ambitious American fulfilling her dream of studying at Oxford falls for a charming Brit hiding a secret that may upend her perfectly planned life.
